allow: PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import db.embeddings; print\('embeddings OK'\); import sys; assert 'psycopg2' not in sys.modules and 'minio' not in sys.modules and 'pdfplumber' not in sys.modules, 'leaked dep'; print\('isolation OK'\)")

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import db.minio_client; print\('minio_client OK'\); import sys; assert 'psycopg2' not in sys.modules and 'sentence_transformers' not in sys.modules and 'pdfplumber' not in sys.modules, 'leaked dep'; print\('isolation OK'\)")

PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\('localhost', 7000\); Write-Host 'PG:7000 reachable' } catch { Write-Host "PG:7000 NOT reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { $tcp.Close\(\) }; $tcp2 = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp2.Connect\('localhost', 7002\); Write-Host 'MinIO:7002 reachable' } catch { Write-Host "MinIO:7002 NOT reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { $tcp2.Close\(\) })
